title: galium densiflorum var. saurense
intro: Galium densiflorum var. saurense, also known as the alpine bedstraw, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of alpine bedstraw include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support immune function and promote wound healing. Alpine bedstraw is often prepared as a tincture or infused oil, and can be used topically to treat skin conditions, or taken internally as a supplement to support overall health.
